company.what_they_do: Goji Labs is a Los Angeles-based digital product agency (founded 2014) that designs, builds, and scales custom software: mobile apps (iOS & Android), web applications, and UX/UI design. They lead with product strategy, UX research, and engineering to take clients from idea to launched product. They serve startups, scaleups, enterprises, Fortune 500s, and nonprofits across verticals including EdTech, FinTech, HealthTech, SaaS, PropTech, SportsTech, and more. They are also increasingly positioning around AI product development and AI prototyping.
raw_notes: Founded 2014; legal name Goji Labs LLC; privately held; 11–50 employees.
Headquarters: 800 Wilshire Blvd, Ste 200, Los Angeles, CA 90017. Also has a New York address (12 E 49th St, Floor 11).
Founders: David Barlev (CEO) and Adam Sumner (CTO), per Crunchbase.
Shipped 500+ digital products per Clutch profile; 400+ per Crunchbase/ZoomInfo.
Notable clients include WWF, Mitsubishi, and KCRW.
Client partners have raised over $1B in funding in aggregate.
Recent AI push: builds functional AI prototypes, AI-powered products and platforms.
Service lines: Product Strategy Consulting, Mobile App Development (iOS/Android), Web Development, UX/UI Design, UX Research, UX Auditing, IoT development.
Industry verticals: EdTech, FinTech, HealthTech, Nonprofit, SaaS, Social Media, SportsTech, Gaming, Marketplaces, E-commerce, PropTech.
Pricing: min project size $25K+; avg hourly rate $100–$149/hr; project costs range $10K–$600K+.

Awards: Best of CES 2023 (DroneRush), Best Mobile App Developers in LA 2022 (Expertise), Forbes Business Award 2021, Top Creative & Design Agencies in CA 2020 (Clutch), Top B2B Companies in CA 2023 (Clutch), Top Mobile App Dev Companies Jan 2024 (DesignRush).
Tech stack noted publicly: WordPress, PHP, Cloudflare; engineering roles use Node.js, React, React Native, TypeScript, Ruby on Rails, Swift, Go.
Currently hiring: Senior Go Engineer, Full Stack TypeScript Developer, Engineering Manager.
Sample portfolio projects: Huupe (smart basketball hoop), Prediction Strike (athlete stock market), Schoolhouse Moolah (classroom economy app), Fitness Pact (fitness accountability app).
